---
title: 'What is this?'
date: '2022-06-26T16:20:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Dirty Pastor'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '815233349650298599'
blogger_filename: '/2022/06/what-is-this.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Dirty Pastor/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;Honestly, I'm not sure what this is yet. Jen and I agree that churches and churchy people avoid the topic of sex as though it was taboo. As a result, the world own the market on the topic. A very few voices are addressing this issue, and I have decided to be one of them. I don't know if it'll just amount to a few funny sex related memes pointed at how funny we humans are about sex. Or if it will become a fully developed chanel to discuss the topics of marriage. Either way, Jen's been asking me to start this brand for two years. Others have asked me to do something similar for longer. So here it goes.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>
